extensionDescription.message: Use this extension to synchronize bookmarks and tabs with a self-hosted backend.

optionsBTNImportHint.message: Restore from backend, overwrite local bookmarks.

optionsBTNExportHint.message: Overwrite all bookmarks on the backend.

optionsNotUsed.message: You can now synchronize bookmarks from the backend.

optionsErrorUser.message: Login failed: Please check username and password.

optionsBeforeCImpExp.message: With this you can restore your existing device settings from the backend.

optionsBeforeLogin.message: Please log in with your credentials to receive an access your bookmarks

optionsWrongAData.message: Login error. Please log in again

infoRestoreID.message: Should the old device be removed from the backend to avoid synchronization problems?

optionsBeforeImport.message: Should all local bookmarks be deleted before import?

optionsBeforeExport.message:
All bookmarks are deleted at the backend before exporting. Afterwards the new bookmarks are exported to the backend.

Should the remote bookmarks be deleted before the export?

optionsInfoRemove.message:
When you continue, all your current bookmarks are removed.

Are you sure to delete all local bookmarks?

errorGetBookmarks.message: There was a error retrieving the bookmarks from the backend. The status response is:

errorSaveBookmarks.message: There was some error saving all bookmarks. The status response is:

errorExportBookmarks.message: There was a problem exporting the bookmarks.

successExportBookmarks.message: Local bookmarks successfully added at backend.

infoNewClient.message: This browser is a new device and is now registered at the backend.

infoEmptyConfig.message: Configuration is empty. Please configure the AddOn before use.

optionsRestoreServer.message: The following devices can be restored from the backend. Please select a device from the list or click on cancel to not use any of these devices.

optionsBAPIHint.message: The Bookmark API is not supported in this browser. Automatic synchronization is therefore deactivated.

optionsPuDelConfirm.message: Should the selected bookmarks be removed?
